subtitle: 银幕巨星告别
opus_summary: 萨姆·尼尔在悉尼去世，享年78岁。家属称其离世突然，但此前已摆脱癌症；文章回顾他从《沉睡者》到《侏罗纪公园》及《侏罗纪世界3》的数十年演艺生涯，以及正在后期制作中的《Godzilla x Kong: Supernova》。

paragraphs.en: Screen icon Sam Neill has died today in Sydney, Australia. The news was confirmed via a statement published on Neill’s Instagram on Monday, July 13 2026. He was 78.
paragraphs.cn: 银幕偶像萨姆·尼尔今日在澳大利亚悉尼去世。尼尔家人于2026年7月13日星期一在Instagram发布声明，证实了这一消息。他享年78岁。

paragraphs.en: “It is with immense sadness that the whānau of Sam Neill share the news of his passing on Monday 13th July, in Sydney Australia,” reads the post. “Sam was surrounded by family and passed with the dignity that has characterised his whole life.”
paragraphs.cn: 帖子写道：「萨姆·尼尔的家人怀着无比悲痛的心情，分享他于7月13日星期一在澳大利亚悉尼去世的消息。萨姆在家人陪伴下离世，并以贯穿一生的尊严走完最后一程。」

paragraphs.en: “The loss was sudden and unexpected but blessed by the fact that Sam remained cancer free. They would like to express their deepest gratitude to the staff at St Vincent’s Private Hospital for their incredible care.
paragraphs.cn: 「这次离世突然且出乎意料，但值得庆幸的是，萨姆此前已摆脱癌症。家人谨向圣文森特私立医院的工作人员表达最深切的感谢，感谢他们无微不至的照护。」

paragraphs.en: “More details will be shared later, but for now, on behalf of the family, we ask that you respect their privacy as they navigate this immeasurable loss.”
paragraphs.cn: 「更多细节稍后公布，但现在，代表家人，我们请求大家在应对这份无法估量的损失时尊重他们的隐私。」

paragraphs.en: Born in Northern Ireland to an English mother and a New Zealand-born father, Neill and his family moved to the South Island of New Zealand in the mid-1950s, settling in Christchurch.
paragraphs.cn: 尼尔出生于北爱尔兰，母亲是英格兰人，父亲出生于新西兰。20世纪50年代中期，他随家人搬到新西兰南岛，并在基督城定居。

paragraphs.en: Neill’s entertainment career began in New Zealand, initially culminating in a role in the 1977 action thriller Sleeping Dogs, directed by Roger Donaldson. The film was a significant success and launched Neill’s international career.
paragraphs.cn: 尼尔的演艺生涯始于新西兰，最初凭借罗杰·唐纳森执导的1977年动作惊悚片《沉睡者》中的角色崭露头角。这部电影取得了巨大成功，也开启了尼尔的国际演艺生涯。

paragraphs.en: Neill then headed to Australia, where he would receive further international exposure via award-winning 1979 Australian period drama My Brilliant Career, which he starred in alongside Judy Davis.
paragraphs.cn: 随后，尼尔前往澳大利亚，与朱迪·戴维斯共同出演1979年获奖的澳大利亚时代剧情片《我的璀璨生涯》，进一步获得国际关注。

paragraphs.en: In 1981 Neill played the adult Damien Thorn, son of the Devil, in Omen III: The Final Conflict, and had roles in a string of Australian films throughout the ’80s, including Attack Force Z alongside Mel Gibson, Dead Calm alongside Nicole Kidman, and many more.
paragraphs.cn: 1981年，尼尔在《Omen III：The Final Conflict》中饰演成年后的恶魔之子达米安·索恩。整个20世纪80年代，他还出演了一系列澳大利亚电影，包括与梅尔·吉布森共同出演的《Attack Force Z》、与妮可·基德曼共同出演的《Dead Calm》等。

paragraphs.en: In 1993, Neill made himself a household name as Dr. Alan Grant in Steven Spielberg’s blockbuster Jurassic Park, a role he reprised twice, in 2001’s Jurassic Park III and 2022’s Jurassic World Dominion.
paragraphs.cn: 1993年，尼尔在史蒂文·斯皮尔伯格的卖座大片《侏罗纪公园》中饰演艾伦·格兰特博士，一举家喻户晓。他又在2001年的《侏罗纪公园3》和2022年的《侏罗纪世界3》中两度回归这一角色。

paragraphs.en: Neill continued to demonstrate his immense versatility over the next three decades, equally adept at handling the sci-fi horror of 1997’s Event Horizon as he was the dry humour something like 2000 comedy-drama The Dish.
paragraphs.cn: 在接下来的三十年里，尼尔继续展现惊人的戏路广度：他既能驾驭1997年科幻恐怖片《Event Horizon》，也能处理2000年喜剧剧情片《The Dish》那样的冷幽默。

paragraphs.en: In 2023, Neill revealed that he had been diagnosed with a type of blood cancer, and had been privately undergoing chemotherapy for a year. In April 2026, he shared an update that he had , and subsequently was informed that scans no longer detected cancer in his body.
paragraphs.cn: 2023年，尼尔透露自己被诊断出一种血癌，并已私下接受化疗一年。2026年4月，他分享了一则更新，但原文此处缺失具体表述；随后他得知扫描结果已不再检测到体内癌症。

paragraphs.en: Neill is set to make one of his final film appearances in 2027’s Godzilla x Kong: Supernova, which is currently in post-production.
paragraphs.cn: 尼尔将在目前处于后期制作阶段的2027年电影《Godzilla x Kong: Supernova》中完成其最后几次电影演出之一。

paragraphs.en: Luke is a Senior Editor on the IGN reviews team.
paragraphs.cn: Luke是IGN评测团队的高级编辑。
